name: closing
prompt: Wide shot from outside — small transport vessel approaching massive Vantage station. The transport tiny against the station's scale. Construction frames reaching toward forever, bright lights against void, ships in formation. Inside the transport, visible through viewport: single silhouette of woman facing forward, not looking back. The future waiting. For as long as living meant. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, epic scale, cinematic composition
